description: Links to HAP_KEY, e.g. Haplotype_1, Primary, etc.
Derived EBP summary metric for the assembly used in the Genome Note table, for example 6.C.Q40.
EBP reference standard used as the benchmark for the table, for example 6.C.Q40 or 5.C.Q40.
Reason this reference standard was selected, for example standard_input, manual_override, low_input_material or uli.
Whether the selected assembly meets the EBP reference standard; absent or null if required metrics are missing.
Derived status for the selected EBP reference standard.
Derived list of failed EBP criteria, for example contig_n50_below_standard, percent_assigned_to_chromosomes_below_standard or qv_below_standard.
Derived list of required EBP input metrics that were unavailable.
Contig N50 benchmark for the selected EBP reference standard, in megabases.
Display label for the contig N50 benchmark, for example >= 1 Mb.
Percentage assigned to chromosomes required by the selected EBP reference standard.
QV required by the selected EBP reference standard.
